blended.narrative: Castle Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,074 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
